message:
feat(fp-frame): add Series.ewm().sum()/cov() parity (frankenpandas-8dru)

Two EWM reducers on Series:

- sum() — recursive weighted sum via s_t = x_t + (1-alpha) * s_{t-1}.
  Missing values keep the accumulator frozen (pandas skipna=True
  convention).
- cov(other) — exponentially-weighted sample covariance with
  Welford-style online updates. Result is bias-corrected by the
  cumulative weight `1 - (1-alpha)^nobs`. Length mismatch returns
  LengthMismatch; both-missing or NaN positions emit Null(NaN)
  without advancing the running estimate. First observation emits
  Null(NaN) (sample cov undefined).

Tests: ewm_sum_basic, ewm_sum_skips_nulls, ewm_cov_positively_correlated_converges_positive,
ewm_cov_length_mismatch_errors.

Co-lands frankenpandas-ytey (cov). frankenpandas-5agu (corr) remains
open — a correct bias-aware cov + var quotient still produces
visible drift off the 1.0 asymptote on short windows, so the corr
pass is deferred until the bias correction is harmonized across cov
and var.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
